summary: Landmark Dark Star and the first Tighten Up (Soulful Strut) jam make this show a treasure, despite no specific comments on the recording source.
review: The performance is hailed as a great leap forward, with Dark Star’s soaring improvisation and the debut Tighten Up/Soulful Strut jam marking a major development in the band’s evolution. Reviewers note Jerry Garcia’s broken string but commend his quick recovery, and overall describe the show as a triumphant, historic moment. No technical details about the recording quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (5 ★) praising the musical performance heavily; recording quality not addressed, so rating leans on show quality with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a pivotal moment with groundbreaking improvisation and a triumphant climax after Jerry’s string break.

band_member_comments.Jerry: String broke early, but his recovery was described as remarkable; overall guitar work praised despite the issue.
